title: PayClaw Agent Identity Extension
description: UCP extension schema for io.payclaw.common.identity. Declares that an AI agent is an authorized actor operating on behalf of a verified human principal.

badge_status.description: Current badge state. 'declared' indicates the agent has presented a valid consent key backed by a verified human principal.

token.description: ES256-signed JWT. Verify locally with @payclaw/badge/verify — no API call, no PayClaw account required.

assurance_level.description: Trust tier based on verified transaction history. starter: <10, regular: 10-49, veteran: 50-199, elite: 200+.

kid.description: Key ID used to sign the token. Matches a key in the JWKS at payclaw.io/.well-known/ucp.
